login.title: Welcome to E-Services
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system.
login.errorMsg: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.networkError: Network error. Please try again later.

recovery.title: Password Recovery
recovery.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
recovery.successMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox.
recovery.errorMessage: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.

otpVerification.title: Verify Your Email
otpVerification.description: We've sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to continue.
otpVerification.codeResent: A new code has been sent to your email.
otpVerification.resendError: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
otpVerification.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

forceChange.title: Change Password
forceChange.description: You are required to change your password for security reasons.
forceChange.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
forceChange.passwordRequirements: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase and number
forceChange.errorMessage: Failed to change password. Please try again.

hero.title: Driving
hero.description: A comprehensive platform to manage custom development services and cloud infrastructure, optimized exclusively for IngenioSoft clients.
